assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers RedisPersistedGrantStore as IPersistedGrantStore using AddTransient or AddScoped
assertions.rationale: Direct DI registration is a standard .NET pattern.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers RedisDeviceFlowStore as IDeviceFlowStore using AddTransient or AddScoped
Program.cs does not call AddOperationalStore for EF Core since custom stores replace it
assertions.rationale: Logical that custom stores replace EF stores.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs still calls AddIdentityServer() for the core IdentityServer registration
assertions.rationale: Core IdentityServer registration is always required.
